Added_Other.purpose: Provides players with the most current information about friends and game stats, improving social interactions.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Dynamically retrieves the current Git hash for version tracking.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures players are using the latest version of the game by tracking updates accurately.

Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that time-related information is displayed correctly and consistently.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString

Changed_Other.purpose: Increases the efficiency of loading and processing game data, leading to a smoother gameplay experience.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps to improve performance.
